---
title: "Cognitive classification in HRS Core: Learning from HCAP"
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-image: ../Figures/Gemini-Brown-Amphibian.png
  data-background-size: contain
  data-background-opacity: "1"
author: "Rich Jones and Doug Tommet for HRS/HCAP Working Group"
date: '`r Sys.Date()`'
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: white
    slide-number: true
    self-contained: true
    code-copy: true
    code-line-numbers: true
    fig-align: center
    controls: true
    controls-layout: bottom-right
editor: source
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
      .reveal .slide-number {
        top: 1em !important;
        right: 1em !important;
        bottom: auto !important;
        left: auto !important;
      }
      .reveal pre {
        max-height: 850px !important;
        width: 100% !important;
        overflow-y: auto !important;
      }
      .reveal pre code {
        max-height: 850px !important;
        overflow-y: auto !important;
      }
      </style>
---

```{r setup}
#| include: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

invisible(
  suppressMessages(
    suppressPackageStartupMessages({
      source(here::here("R", "001-libraries.R"))
      source(here::here("R", "002-folder_paths.R"))
    })
  )
)
```

{{< include Slides2603_010_Introduction.qmd >}}
{{< include Slides2603_020_Structure.qmd >}}
{{< include Slides2603_030_Covariate-adjustment.qmd >}}
{{< include Slides2603_040_Results.qmd >}}
{{< include Slides2603_060_Comparison_Tables.qmd >}}
{{< include Slides2603_070_Conclusion.qmd >}}
